senses.gloss: place which one touches to make a judgment from it
to Zoroastrianize, to teach someone Zoroastrianism

examples.text: كُلُّ مَوْلُودٍ يُولَدُ عَلَى الْفِطْرَةِ، فَأَبَوَاهُ يُهَوِّدَانِهِ أَوْ يُنَصِّرَانِهِ أَوْ يُمَجِّسَانِهِ
examples.english: Every newborn is born upon the fitra; its parents then Judaize or Christianize or Zoroastrianize it.

etymology.text:
Noun of place from the root ج س س (j s s).

Tool noun from the root ج س س (j s s).

Denominal verb of مَجُوس (majūs, “Zoroastrians”, collective), forming the root م ج س (m j s).
